episodes.title: CULT Mum Killed Her Own Baby Believing She Was 'EVIL'
episodes.description:
A mother was pulled deep into cult beliefs and severe delusions - and her baby paid the ultimate price.
This is the disturbing case of Chloe Driver, where faith, fear and mental collapse ended in tragedy.

episodes.title: 257: ABUSED by a "CULT' leader - The Shocking Case of Ruby Franke and Jodi Hildebrandt
episodes.description: In my latest episode of true crime , I delve into disturbing case of Ruby Franke, a former family vlogger known for her YouTube channel "8 Passengers," and her business associate, Jodi Hildebrandt. Em x
